title: useDndMonitor - Monitor Drag Events
description: Hook to monitor drag and drop events from any child component within DndContext.

title: Modifiers - Restrict and Transform Movement
description: Using modifiers to restrict drag movement to window edges, parent container, axes, or snap to grid.
content:
# Modifiers - Restrict and Transform Movement

Modifiers dynamically alter movement coordinates. Apply to DndContext or DragOverlay.

```jsx
import {DndContext, DragOverlay} from '@dnd-kit/core';
import {restrictToWindowEdges, restrictToParentElement, restrictToVerticalAxis, restrictToHorizontalAxis, snapCenterToCursor, createSnapModifier} from '@dnd-kit/modifiers';

<DndContext modifiers={[restrictToWindowEdges]}>
  {/* ... */}
</DndContext>

<DragOverlay modifiers={[restrictToParentElement, restrictToVerticalAxis]}>
  {activeId ? <Item id={activeId} /> : null}
</DragOverlay>
```

Available modifiers (@dnd-kit/modifiers):
- restrictToWindowEdges - confine to window
- restrictToParentElement - confine to parent
- restrictToVerticalAxis - vertical only
- restrictToHorizontalAxis - horizontal only
- snapCenterToCursor - snap to cursor center
- createSnapModifier(gridSize) - snap to grid

title: DragDropProvider - New React API
description: New DragDropProvider component with explicit sensors, plugins, and modifiers props.
